samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Frequency divider for generating different clock frequencies based on input clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Counts up to 1, 4, and 49 to generate the desired clock frequencies.</implementation>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <signal id="cnt_10">Counter for generating CLK_10.</signal>
        <signal id="cnt_100">Counter for generating CLK_1.</signal>
        <always_comb>
            <if condition="posedge CLK_in or posedge RST">
                <if condition="RST">
                    <assign value="0" signal_id="CLK_50"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <assign value="~CLK_50" signal_id="CLK_50"/>
                </else>
            </if>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <if condition="posedge CLK_in or posedge RST">
                <if condition="RST">
                    <assign value="0" signal_id="CLK_10"/>
                    <assign value="0" signal_id="cnt_10"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <if condition="cnt_10 == 4">
                        <assign value="~CLK_10" signal_id="CLK_10"/>
                        <assign value="0" signal_id="cnt_10"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign value="cnt_10 + 1" signal_id="cnt_10"/>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </if>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <if condition="posedge CLK_in or posedge RST">
                <if condition="RST">
                    <assign value="0" signal_id="CLK_1"/>
                    <assign value="0" signal_id="cnt_100"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <if condition="cnt_100 == 49">
                        <assign value="~CLK_1" signal_id="CLK_1"/>
                        <assign value="0" signal_id="cnt_100"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign value="cnt_100 + 1" signal_id="cnt_100"/>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </if>
        </always_comb>
    </logic_description>
</module>
